productDisplayName: Puma Men Driving Power Light Grey Shoes
description: These Driving Power Light Low shoes from puma are a spin off from the high-top version and they're a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by ferrari's style and class, are perfect for those who love a little show off drama in their casual ensembles.UpperLow top foamy synthetic upper with synthetic overlays for durability and protectionPerforations all over the upper for ventilationLace-ups for snug FitPadded ankle supportLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortJumping cat logo embroidered on the tongueFerrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heelPlastic heel cup with the outsole reinforced onto itMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
